body.title: Inference proxy: Wire mini-rack + update Granny routing
body.result: inference_dispatch_fn routes sprint tickets to deepseek-v4-flash via OR (worker) or qwen (minion); Granny daemon defaults non-claude tickets to inference path; budget_ledger.py committed; operational note: worker=claude required to keep CC dispatch
body.description:
Wire the 4 inference sub-devices into the proxy mini-rack. Update Granny to pass task_class on dispatch so the rules engine routes correctly. Granny sets task_class='worker' for sprint tickets by default; 'minion' for tickets tagged 'minion'. Sprint tickets now route to deepseek-v4-flash (~$0.10/1M) instead of Claude.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/device.py, devices/granny/dispatch.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: mini-rack assembly, Granny dispatch update, task_class field. Out of scope: eval harness integration (T-model-eval-harness already done).
**Completion criteria:** Granny dispatches a sprint ticket that runs against deepseek-v4-flash via OR. Cost logged in inference Store. Not Claude.
